## Summary

What problem does this feature solve, and what changed?

## User Impact

- Who is affected?
- What is now possible that was not possible before?

## Scope

- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Simulation / gameplay
- [ ] Content packs / authored content
- [ ] Tooling / scripts / CI

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run content:validate` if content/manifests changed
- [ ] `npm run content:validate:audit` or `npm run audit:gate` if gameplay/content behavior changed

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] README updated if player-facing surface changed
- [ ] CONTRIBUTORS updated if contributor workflow changed
- [ ] Design/architecture docs updated where behavior changed
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Risks / Follow-ups

- Any migration or rollout risk?
- Any intentional follow-up work?
